modeReason: Progress controller assessment: All 6 open PRs MERGEABLE with CI green. No critical issues without PRs. Backlog shrinking (148 closed vs 126 created in 7 days). KE Sprint advancing (KE-2, KE-3 shipped). Risk score stable.

prBlastRadius.note: 6 open PRs, all MERGEABLE, all CI green. Mix of docs (#821, #823), triage (#820), release prep (#822), white paper (#818), and feature (#814). No stuck or conflicted PRs.

testFailureRate.note: All 6 open PRs passing full CI suites. Main branch CI green. No active CI regressions.

governanceDenialRate.note: HIGH-severity security gaps remain without PRs: #638 (fail-open policy evaluator), #637 (AAB regex bypass). False-positive issues #646, #648, #650 are being closed via PR #820 triage.

mergeConflictRate.note: 0 conflicted PRs. 6 open PRs all MERGEABLE.

activePhases.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
remaining: Default-deny unknown actions (#815, #638) — no assigned PR, highest priority security work
Enforce PAUSE and ROLLBACK (#608) — PR #820 claims this is done (PRs #475, #617 merged), pending ROADMAP update
activePhases.blockingReason: Default-deny (#815/#638) is the remaining open checkbox item. If PR #820 merges (marks PAUSE/ROLLBACK done), phase goes to 6/7 (86%) but still blocked by default-deny.
activePhases.note: PR #820 will update ROADMAP to mark PAUSE/ROLLBACK as done. After that merge, only default-deny remains.

activePhases.name: Kernel Evolution Sprint

KE-2.codeEvidence: ActionContext type shipped in commit ed68c20 (feat(issue-685)). First checkbox (design ActionContext contract) is complete. Remaining: adapter mapping, policy engine migration, benchmark.

KE-3.codeEvidence: Full GovernanceEvent envelope implementation shipped in commit d649f9d (feat(issue-686)). PR #820 will mark all checkboxes as done.

activePhases.note: KE-3 shipped but ROADMAP not yet updated. KE-2 partially done (ActionContext type). PR #820 will correct ROADMAP for KE-3. Sprint is 40% complete (KE-1 done, KE-3 done, KE-2 partial).

activePhases.name: v3.0 Major Release
activePhases.note: PR #822 (feat(issue-749): v3.0 release prep) is open, CI green, MERGEABLE. Working on site update and version bump. Blocked until Phase 6 default-deny + KE-2 ActionContext are complete.

plannedPhases.name: Policy Ecosystem
plannedPhases.note: Policy templates and composition done. Remaining: community packs, registry, domain packs, provider interface, remediation mode.

plannedPhases.name: Editor & Agent Integrations
plannedPhases.note: Monitor mode and Agent SDK done. Depends on KE-2 for vendor-neutral normalization.

roadmapDiscrepancies.evidence: Commit ed68c20 (feat(issue-685): add ActionContext type for vendor-neutral action normalization)
roadmapDiscrepancies.action: ROADMAP checkbox should be checked. No PR currently addresses this.

roadmapDiscrepancies.evidence: Commit d649f9d (feat(issue-686): implement KE-3 Governance Event Envelope)
roadmapDiscrepancies.action: PR #820 will mark KE-3 as done in ROADMAP.

roadmapDiscrepancies.evidence: PR #820 claims PRs #475 and #617 already merged this feature
roadmapDiscrepancies.action: PR #820 will update ROADMAP to check this item.

backlogExpansionRate.note: Backlog is shrinking: 148 closed vs 126 created in 7 days (net -22). Aggressive triage ongoing — PR #820 alone closes 20 issues. However, total open issues (94) have grown significantly since last assessment (28 implementation issues on 2026-03-22). Growth driven by backlog-steward creating ROADMAP tracking issues (57 issues with source:backlog-steward label). Triage rate is keeping pace.

warningPhases.name: Editor & Agent Integrations
warningPhases.note: Claude Code deep integration (#331) and JetBrains plugin have no recent PR activity. 7 days without progress. Still within monitoring window. Alert if no activity by 2026-04-07.
warningPhases.recommendation: If no PR activity on #331 by 2026-04-07, flag as stalled.

details.title: docs: sync with KE-2, KE-3, Copilot CLI parity, and postinstall auto-setup
feat(issue-749): v3.0 release prep — site update, version bump
docs: fix documentation drift (invariant counts, event kinds, missing files)
chore: backlog triage — close 20 issues, update ROADMAP
docs(issue-312): update white paper invariant table (Section 6.2)
feat: fix subagent identity resolution + hierarchical run support

blockers.description: Default-deny unknown actions — the single most important remaining Phase 6 item. Policy evaluator currently fails open (allows unknown actions). This must ship before v3.0.
blockers.recommendation: Assign coder-agent to implement default-deny in evaluator.ts. This is the architectural hinge for Phase 6 completion.

blockers.description: AAB regex-based detection bypassable. KE-1 matchers partially address this but the issue remains open.
blockers.recommendation: Evaluate if KE-1 structured matchers have closed this vector. If so, close the issue.

systemSummary.progressSinceLastRun: Significant KE Sprint progress: KE-3 Governance Event Envelope shipped (d649f9d), KE-2 ActionContext type shipped (ed68c20). 5 kernel false positives fixed (#800-805). Copilot CLI brought to full parity. Postinstall auto-setup added. Commit-scope-guard invariant (#22) added. v3.0 release prep PR (#822) in flight. PR #820 will close 20 issues and update ROADMAP. Backlog shrinking (net -22 issues in 7 days).
